signals.question: US × Iran ceasefire by April 15?
evidence: Iran rejected US 15-point ceasefire plan March 25, calling it 'maximalist, unreasonable' — Al Jazeera https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/3/25/iran-calls-us-proposal-to-end-war-maximalist-unreasonable

Iran FM: 'no peace talks with US have taken place' and Iran has 'no plans for negotiations' — NBC News https://www.nbcnews.com/world/middle-east/live-blog/live-updates-iran-war-talks-trump-peace-plan-troops-hormuz-rcna265051
Trump extended energy strike pause to April 6 but warned he will destroy Iran's energy plants if Hormuz not reopened — NPR https://www.npr.org/2026/03/26/nx-s1-5761882/iran-war-peace-conditions

Israel warns attacks 'will escalate and expand'; struck IRGC navy commander + Isfahan targets March 26-27 — PBS https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/israel-warns-attacks-on-iran-will-escalate-and-expand-as-trump-says-ceasefire-talks-are-going-very-well
Pakistan backchannel ongoing but Iran publicly refuses to negotiate; resolution requires 'clear public confirmation from both governments'
Only 19 days to close; no direct talks framework exists; Iran's 5 counterdemands (reparations, Hormuz sovereignty) are non-starters for US
signals.reasoning: Iran has publicly rejected the US ceasefire plan, denied any negotiations, and hardened its counterdemands. With only indirect backchannel via Pakistan, active military escalation on both sides, and 19 days until close, 25% dramatically overestimates the probability of a formal ceasefire requiring public confirmation from both governments. Price moved from 28.5% to 25% since last scan — still overpriced.

signals.question: US × Iran ceasefire by April 30?
evidence: Iran rejected US 15-point ceasefire plan March 25; Iran's 5 counterdemands include reparations and Strait of Hormuz sovereignty — CNBC https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/25/iran-war-us-trump.html

Iran FM denies any negotiations taking place; Pakistan backchannel confirmed but insufficient — NBC News https://www.nbcnews.com/world/middle-east/live-blog/live-updates-iran-war-talks-trump-peace-plan-troops-hormuz-rcna265051

Military escalation continuing: Israel struck IRGC navy commander + Isfahan; Trump's energy pause expires April 6 — threatens energy plant destruction — NPR https://www.npr.org/2026/03/26/nx-s1-5761882/iran-war-peace-conditions

Trump claims talks going 'very well' but Iran contradicts this publicly — PBS https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/israel-warns-attacks-on-iran-will-escalate-and-expand-as-trump-says-ceasefire-talks-are-going-very-well
Historical base rate: wars of this scale rarely produce formal ceasefires within 2 months; fundamental disagreements on terms remain unresolved
signals.reasoning: The diplomatic impasse is fundamental — Iran refuses direct talks, demands reparations and Hormuz sovereignty, while US-Israel escalate militarily. A formal ceasefire requiring public confirmation from both sides within 34 days is highly unlikely. Pakistan backchannel is promising but insufficient given Iran's public intransigence. At 39.5%, the market significantly overprices YES.

signals.question: US × Iran ceasefire by April 7?
evidence: Iran rejected US ceasefire plan 2 days ago; FM denies any talks are occurring — Al Jazeera, NBC News
Trump's energy strike pause deadline expires April 6 — escalation likely resumes before this market closes — NPR https://www.npr.org/2026/03/26/nx-s1-5761882/iran-war-peace-conditions
Only 11 days until close; no direct talks, no framework for agreement; resolution requires mutual public confirmation from both governments
Pakistan backchannel ongoing but insufficient to produce formal agreement in 11 days when Iran publicly refuses to negotiate
signals.reasoning: With Iran publicly refusing talks, active military escalation, and only 11 days remaining, a formal ceasefire requiring public confirmation from both governments by April 7 is near-impossible. Trump's energy pause deadline expires April 6 — escalation likely resumes before this market closes.
